data.title: David’s Bridal acquires Love Stories TV, launches retail media network
data.description: Love Stories will power David's Bridal's new Pearl retail media network.

data.title: Xometry expands its global custom-manufacturing marketplace
data.description: The platform supports 16 local languages and multiple currencies, enabling suppliers worldwide to join and conduct business across regions.

data.title: Dollar Tree makes Creedon its permanent CEO
data.description: Creedon becomes CEO at Dollar Tree as the retailer navigates challenges and the future of the Family Dollar banner.

data.title: Perry Ellis tries new AI recommendations for its apparel online
data.description: The engine Perry Ellis is using comes from Syte, which has a AI solutions specially tailored to clothing and ecommerce.

data.title: Q&A: How AI helps make anti-fragile supply chains the new normal in 2025
data.description: Darcy MacClaren, chief revenue officer, SAP Digital Supply Chain, discusses how AI gives B2B companies information and tools like digital twins to build resilient supply chains.
